NOTES   (see introductory pages for explanation of train operator codes and standard symbols)
a
Arrival time
d
Departure time
V
Stops to set down only
M72
Mondays and Tuesdays only
M7X
Not Mondays and Tuesdays
76M
Tuesday to Saturday mornings

NOTES   (see introductory pages for explanation of train operator codes and standard symbols)
a
Arrival time
d
Departure time
A
Runs until 4 October
B
Runs from 11 October
